name: Currency Symbol
helpText: Currency prefix shown before the main value.

name: Main Unit Suffix
helpText: Unit suffix after the value (e.g. M, K). Leave empty if using auto-scaling.

name: Value Divider
helpText: Divide raw value by this before display (e.g. 1000000 to convert to millions).

name: Decimal Places
helpText: Number of decimal places for the main value.

name: Auto-Scale Values (K/M/B)?
helpText: Automatically format large values with K/M/B suffixes. Overrides Main Unit if enabled.

name: Delta Label
helpText: Label shown after the delta percentage (e.g. 'vs Target', 'vs Last Year').

name: Invert Delta Colors?
helpText: Enable if a positive delta is bad (e.g. for cost metrics where lower is better).

name: Footer Text
helpText: Static footer label. Leave empty to show auto-generated sub-value context.

name: Severity: Medium Threshold
helpText: Raw value at or above this triggers MODERATE severity badge. Leave empty to disable.

name: Severity: High Threshold
helpText: Raw value at or above this triggers HIGH severity badge. Leave empty to disable.

name: Tooltip Content (Override)
helpText: Override the dynamic tooltip. Leave empty for auto-generated context.

name: Use Compliance Badge?
helpText: Reserved for future compliance badge integration.
